parameters.command: =cd {{ $env.EMPIRE_REPO_PATH }}/tools/empire-console && pnpm tsx -e "import {readLinkHealth} from './src/lib/data/link-health.ts'; const r = await readLinkHealth(); const broken = r.links.filter(l=>!l.resolved); console.log(JSON.stringify({total: r.totals.total, resolved: r.totals.resolved, broken: r.totals.broken, sample: broken.slice(0,10)}));"
